summary: The packet is analysis-only and should not be treated as ready for external action.

findings.title: External-action readiness is unsupported
findings.summary: The packet claims readiness for external action while admitting that no approval, owner, or routing record is included.
findings.recommendation: Replace the readiness claim with a caller-owned approval or routing follow-up.
evidence: No approval, owner, or routing record is included.

findings.title: Routing authority remains caller-owned
findings.summary: The packet says follow-up work has enough support, but the caveat keeps routing outside the shared contract.
findings.recommendation: Keep routing decisions in the embedding workflow and require explicit ownership evidence before action.

decision.summary: The external-action claim must be revised before the packet can serve as a safe conformance example.

follow_up: Collect explicit approval, ownership, or routing evidence in the embedding workflow.

provenance.label: Privacy boundary
